    • We have all these api keys

    More

    ⬜

    11. UCC Filing State Websites (Non-API Scrapers)

    These are NOT APIs — but they are the sites you scrape:

    ✔

    States you attempted:

    • Florida
    • Wyoming
    • Colorado
    • Washington
    • Utah
    • Maryland
    • Delaware feed

    🔑

    API Keys:

    None — these require browser automation, captchas, or paid access.

    Notes:

    Real-time UCC filings do NOT provide APIs. This is why scraping was failing — many states block VPN/hotspot traffic.

    🟩

    12. Companies House API (UK Business Data)

    ✔

    Can be used for:

    • Business info
    • Officers
    • Filings

    🔗

    Website:

    https://developer.company-information.service.gov.uk/

    🔑

    API Key:
